overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a corporate executive entering a luxurious high-rise penthouse office. The camera smoothly pans across the futuristic interior featuring holographic data displays, neon-lit city views through floor-to-ceiling windows, and a massive illuminated aquarium wall, showcasing the game's signature cyberpunk aesthetic with dark atmospheric lighting and vibrant neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate executive office with holographic interface

events.description: corporate executive enters and sits down at the executive desk, adjusting his jacket

agents.ego_description: corporate executive walks into the office space and sits at the executive desk, preparing to engage with the holographic displays

entered.detail: large dark executive desk with reflective surface and scattered documents
floor-to-ceiling window wall displaying holographic data overlays and code
pistol resting on the desk surface
papers and tablet on the desk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark, luxurious corporate office. A man in a suit enters and sits at a large executive desk. The room features holographic displays projected across the window wall behind him, with a handgun and documents visible on the desk surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: penthouse office with panoramic city views

events.description: camera begins panning right to reveal the neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape through the floor-to-ceiling windows

agents.ego_description: seated executive remains at his desk, visible in the mid-ground as the camera pans to showcase the city view

entered.detail: panoramic view of cyberpunk city with towering buildings and neon lights visible through the windows
colorful neon advertisements and data displays on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right across the expansive office, revealing a breathtaking view of the neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape through massive windows. The executive remains seated at his desk, now positioned in the mid-ground, while holographic data overlays continue to scroll across the glass. The city lights cast colorful reflections across the room's polished surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury office interior with modern furnishings

events.description: large overhead pendant light fixture enters the frame, adding warm illumination to the previously dark space

agents.ego_description: executive remains seated at the far desk, becoming smaller in the frame as the camera moves away

entered.detail: large modern pendant light hanging from the ceiling
white contemporary sofa in the lounge area
dark wooden cabinet with decorative items and a glowing lamp
tall illuminated floor lamp with warm light

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning left, moving away from the desk to reveal the spacious office interior. A large ceiling light fixture dominates the frame, illuminating modern furniture including a white sofa and a side cabinet with a glowing lamp. The executive and his desk become distant figures in the background as the camera explores the room's layout.

scene_state.functional_zone: executive lounge with panoramic aquarium wall

events.description: camera moves into the lounge area revealing a massive illuminated aquarium wall with swimming fish

agents.ego_description: camera explores the lounge area, focusing on the aquarium and seating arrangement with no character visible

entered.detail: massive floor-to-ceiling aquarium wall filled with water, fish, and aquatic plants emitting a green glow
curved white leather sofa positioned in front of the aquarium
low modern coffee table in front of the sofa
tall indoor plant in a planter near the aquarium

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to a lounge area dominated by a massive illuminated aquarium wall that bathes the space in green light. A white leather sofa and coffee table are arranged before the aquarium, creating a tranquil contrast to the high-tech office area. The executive and his desk are no longer visible as the camera focuses on this serene corner of the penthouse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, high-tech corporate office that gradually expands into a serene, neon-lit lounge. It begins with a man in a suit entering and sitting at a large executive desk cluttered with documents and a handgun, set against a backdrop of holographic displays. As the camera pans right, the scene opens up to reveal a breathtaking view of a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape through massive windows, casting colorful reflections across the polished interior. The movement then shifts left and pulls away from the desk, gliding past a dominant ceiling light fixture and modern white furniture as the executive recedes into the background. Finally, the camera transitions into a lounge area dominated by a massive illuminated aquarium wall, which bathes the white leather sofa and coffee table in a tranquil green glow.
